title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Reclaim your focus and produce elite-level work in a distracted world. 4 actionable Claude Code skills.
longDescription: Cal Newport's Deep Work argues that the ability to perform focused, cognitively demanding work is both increasingly rare and increasingly valuable. In a world of constant notifications, open-plan offices, and social media, those who can go deep will thrive. Newport provides four rules: work deeply by designing rituals and routines, embrace boredom to train your concentration muscle, quit social media by applying a craftsman's approach to tool selection, and drain the shallows by ruthlessly minimizing low-value tasks. These four skills turn those rules into actionable coaching sessions.
